title: Cherry-pick PR #778: updates chessground to 10.1.1 to resolve black line artifacts on chess tiles
description: Updates chessground to 10.1.1, which includes a fix I contributed in https://github.com/lichess-org/chessground/pull/382 for black line artifacts at square boundaries on WebKitGTK (used by Tauri apps on Linux). e.g: After updating, the board seems fine now.

in_scope: Port upstream PR #778 changes to our fork
Resolve any merge conflicts with our modifications
Verify the fix works in our build
out_of_scope: Unrelated changes to the same files

requirements: The bug/feature from PR #778 works correctly

acceptance_gates: PR #778 behavior verified in running app

manual: Verify PR #778 fix in running app
